geographic_restrictions: Primarily for Penobscot tribal members residing in Penobscot County or on the Penobscot Reservation.
project_area: Social services including guardianship, child welfare, elder services, food assistance, and family support programs.
demographic_requirements: Varies by program; primarily serves Penobscot tribal members, with some programs targeting specific age groups (e.g., youth, elders) or families.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility is generally restricted to Penobscot tribal members, with some programs having additional age or residency requirements. Programs include financial assistance, child welfare, elder services, and food support.
